summary: Cleanup suggestions you can trust, plus smoother duplicate discovery on large drives.
introduced: Activity Log for troubleshooting — open from Help → Activity Log
changed: Duplicate detection runs in the background while you browse Overview
Bulk Move to Trash for duplicate groups
Archive Old Videos now lists real video files only
Installer DMG recommendations exclude system folders like Preboot and MobileAsset
fixed: Move to Trash reports failures clearly instead of failing silently
